turns.speaker: Colleague
turns.text: You're honestly the smartest person on the team — nobody writes reports like you. Which is why you should do mine too.

turns.speaker: Coworker
turns.text: I'm pretty swamped with my own deadlines.

turns.speaker: Colleague
turns.text: But you're so much better at it than me. You wouldn't leave a friend hanging, right? You're too good for that.
